electronics.name: 电子

adCopyPatterns.text: Why {product} Enthusiasts Are Switching to [Brand Name]
STOP wasting money on cheap {product}s that break in 3 months.
adCopyPatterns.why: 痛点开头，立刻抓住注意力

adCopyPatterns.text: We spent 2 years engineering the perfect {product}. Here's what makes it different:
Limited stock — we only produce 500 units per batch to ensure quality control.

electronics.tips: 电子类标题必须包含：品牌+核心功能+关键参数（如续航/防水等级）。前3个词最重要——Amazon移动端只显示前80字符。

home.name: 家居

adCopyPatterns.text: Transform Your {room} in Minutes with This {product}
adCopyPatterns.why: 承诺快速改变+具体场景

adCopyPatterns.text: Tired of cluttered countertops? This {product} gives you back your space.
Designed in [City], inspired by minimalist aesthetics. Meet your new favorite {product}.
Join 50,000+ happy homes that upgraded their {room} with {brand}.

home.tips: 家居类图片比文字重要10倍。五点描述中必须包含尺寸+材质。生活方式场景图（lifestyle photo）转化率比白底图高3倍。

fashion.name: 服装

adCopyPatterns.text: The {product} That Goes from Office to Dinner — Effortlessly
Made from our signature {material} blend that feels like luxury, wears like iron.
We spent 18 months sourcing the perfect fabric. The result? A {product} you'll reach for every morning.
Each batch is small — our artisans can only produce 200 pieces per week.

fashion.tips: 服装类Listing最关键的3个元素：尺码表（Size Chart）必须清晰、材质成分（Fabric Content）必须详细、模特实拍（Model Photo）必须有。退货率最高的原因是'尺码不符'。

beauty.name: 美妆

adCopyPatterns.text: The {benefit} Secret That Dermatologists Don't Tell You
Formulated with {ingredient} — the same active used in $200+ luxury serums.
We source {ingredient} from a family-owned farm in [Country]. Each batch is cold-pressed within 24 hours.
Dermatologist-tested. Hypoallergenic. Cruelty-free. Made without parabens, sulfates, or artificial fragrance.

beauty.tips: 美妆Listing最重要的是成分+功效+安全认证。Amazon对美妆有严格的Claims审核——不能说'cure''treat''heal'等医疗词。使用'supports''promotes''helps with'等合规表达。

sports.name: 运动

adCopyPatterns.text: Train Like a Pro — Without the Pro Price Tag
Used by professional trainers at [Gym Name]. Now available for your home gym.
Engineered for performance. Every weld, every stitch, every material choice — optimized for one thing: results.
Don't settle for flimsy equipment that fails mid-workout. Your safety deserves better.

sports.tips: 运动器材Listing必须包含：承重/尺寸/材质/适用人群。视频展示是关键——动态使用视频的转化率比静态图片高2倍以上。

toys.name: 玩具

adCopyPatterns.text: The {product} That Makes Kids Forget About Screens (For Hours)
Winner of the {Year} Parents' Choice Award. Trusted by 10,000+ families.
Designed by educators and tested by kids. The result? A toy that teaches without feeling like homework.
ASTM F963 certified. BPA-free. Rounded edges. Every material meets or exceeds US safety standards.

toys.tips: 玩具Listing必须突出：年龄段（Age Range）、教育价值（Educational Value）、安全认证（Safety Certification）。Amazon要求所有玩具必须有CPC（Children's Product Certificate）。

general.name: 通用

adCopyPatterns.text: Finally — a {product} That Actually Delivers on Its Promises
Built with {material}, designed for {target}. This isn't just another {product}.

general.tips: 通用Listing模板。请根据具体类目补充专用关键词和认证信息。
